table_baselines.csv.description: Baseline comparison table for raw tabular, graph-embedding, and combined models.

table_ablations.csv.description: Ablation table comparing full, reduced, and baseline configurations.

table_global_shap_importance.csv.description: Global SHAP importance over embedding dimensions for the main graph classifier.

table_embedding_feature_mapping.csv.description: Approximate mapping from important embedding dimensions back to Q-Chat and demographic variables.

table_kg_explanation_example.csv.description: Derived example linking one local SHAP explanation to approximate Q-Chat/demographic feature mappings.
